mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO dividend (ts_code, end_date, ann_date, div_proc, stk_div, stk_bo_rate, stk_co_rate, cash_div, cash_div_tax, record_date, ex_date, pay_date, div_listdate, imp_ann_date, base_date, base_share) VALUES
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.endDate}, #{item.annDate}, #{item.divProc}, #{item.stkDiv}, #{item.stkBoRate}, #{item.stkCoRate}, #{item.cashDiv}, #{item.cashDivTax}, #{item.recordDate}, #{item.exDate}, #{item.payDate}, #{item.divListdate}, #{item.impAnnDate}, #{item.baseDate}, #{item.baseShare})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM dividend WHERE (ts_code, end_date, ann_date) IN
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.endDate}, #{item.annDate})
